subcodes.first_line: O ye two blessed souls! The letter was received. Its text indicated that the days of interview are still in memory and have not been forgotten.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness
